text: US Plans to Allow Russian Oil Tanker Into Cuba, Easing Crisis - Bloomberg.com
fullText: A Russian tanker carrying 100,000 tons of oil has arrived in Cuba, as the Communist regime seeks to ease an energy crisis sparked by a US ban on deliveries.

text: As birthright citizenship goes to Supreme Court, here's how Americans feel about it - npr.org

text: US Sees First Combat Loss of Valuable E-3 Jet in Missile Strike - Bloomberg.com
